name: billing-legal
description: Time tracking and billing for attorneys using the claude-for-legal ecosystem. Captures billable time per client and matter in 6-minute increments, supports multi-attorney firms, generates printable invoice exhibits, and provides WIP review and budget tracking.

_notes.root_claude_md: The root CLAUDE.md is a user config template copied to ~/.claude/plugins/config/claude-for-legal/billing/CLAUDE.md by cold-start-interview. It is not loaded as plugin context by Claude Code (validator will warn). All runtime behavior is defined in skills/*/SKILL.md files, which explicitly read from the config path. This matches the pattern used by all claude-for-legal plugins (commercial-legal, ip-legal, etc.) and is intentional.
